data: [Paul] grabs [his] stuff and storms out of my room and then out of my house.
I sit there, looking at [him] disappear, and then my gaze looks back at my broken control…
that was my favorite one too.
My leg was all good now, and I could walk by myself.
The things with [Paul] had been weird at first, but then [he] started acting sweet and tender with me again.
It seemed he had definitely thought about what [he] had done, and genuinely regretted it,
The school bell rings and [Paul] and I start heading towards a nearby cafe
where we would work on our final project.
We were working on a videogame together!
We had a lot of it done, [Paul] was going to work on fixing some bugs that the final game had,
and I was the one in charge of completing the research and justification document.
We arrive at the cafe and open our laptops to keep on working.
After a while, [Paul] stretches and scratches [his] head.
Okay… I think everything is fixed.
You can no longer fall through the floor on room 9 and enemies now act like they’re supposed to.
How’s everything going with the document?
Fine! I just need to complete two sections and it’s all done.
Um, could you tell me the exact mechanics of the fighting system please?
Psh, just search on google how a roguelike works.
Don’t bother me with those stupid questions.
You didn’t help much with this game, so it's only fair that you do all the research, okay?
Hearing that made me a little mad.
I had actually done all the 3D modelling, texturing, audio,
some programming and even got most of the people to do tests on the game’s playability.
It actually felt like [Paul] hadn’t done much.
But I couldn’t tell [him] that, [he] would just get mad.
Time flew by until I had finally finished the document.
I threw my hands in the air as I saved it on my computer.
Finally, our project is all done!
upload it to the school's portal so we don’t forget about it later.
I was about to upload it, but my laptop turned off.
I hadn’t realized my battery was running low.
No! Ugh… My laptop just ran out of battery…
I’ll have to upload it at home.
And… you didn’t bring a charger?
No… I forgot it at home.
I hurriedly get up and gather my stuff.
I-I’ll head home and upload it.
Good. Remember we have until 12 AM to upload it.
Don’t mess it up, will you?
[Paul]'s gaze made me freeze, and I just nod and get out.
I walk quickly to arrive home, when I hear a faint electronic voice.
It is coming from an alleyway.
I approach it and peek inside to find out what that noise is about.
When I peek in, It’s a sight that I can’t believe.
Helpie’s all beat up, his circuits barely functioning as sparks fly from random places.
Is T-this whAt hU-hu-HumANs CallL heav-E-E-E-n?
Helpie… my poor Helpie… let’s get home and get you repaired.
You can explain what happened later.
I lift Helpie with all my strength and rush home.
Once we arrive, I place them in my bed and search for their manual.
Luckily, I also had some spare parts in the box they had come in when I bought them.
I follow the instructions and do some heavy work.
I managed to fix their talkbox and now Helpie was able to speak without stuttering so much.
As I was screwing a new plate onto their arm, I look at them.
So…  What happened Helpie? Who messed you up like this?
I was on my way to buy some groceries that I noticed we were missing,
when suddenly, I felt two men yank me into that alleyway.
They hit me with a metal pipe until I couldn’t move, and then o-opened my back panel.
It appears they were looking for a specific component, but I heard them say
I was not the correct model, and they left me there.
I tried contacting you, and the authorities, but they had smashed my communicator and now it’s useless…
I’m sorry [tn]. I really didn't defend myself…
repairing me will be very costly.
No, no, don’t apologize, Helpie. This wasn’t your fault…
And don’t worry about the repairs… I just want you to be okay.
We both smiled at each other and I kept on working on him.
I managed to repair all of the outer pieces, but his communicator was useless,
along with some wires and other non-vital parts.
Thank you for repairing me [tn], If you don’t mind,
I’ll go and charge myself for a little bit. My battery feels low…
Of course Helpie. See you tomorrow.
Helpie went over to the charging dock and shut off.
I exhaled, feeling happy that nothing had happened to my dear friend.
I look outside and notice the beautiful moon is already up in the sky.
I check my clock, and can feel how my legs wobble when I realize what time it is…
No… No, no, no, no, NO!
I hurriedly plug my laptop and wait for it to charge enough.
When it does, I open the school’s portal and go to upload the project.
The page says it’s past the due date, but it still lets me upload it.
I do so, and hope the teacher won’t be harsh on us for being 20 minutes late.
I lay on my bed and feel my heart beat at a 1000 miles per hour.
[Paul] must NOT know about this… or else.. I don’t even want to imagine.
I close my eyes and hope nothing bad will happen tomorrow…
I sit on my desk. I feel my hands tremble, as I wait patiently for the teacher to come.
I need to talk to her before [Paul] arrives to
explain why I uploaded the document late.
I look out the window, trying to see if [Paul] is already on [his] way to class.
Suddenly, a hand on my shoulder makes me jump.
Morning. A little bit jumpy, aren’t you?
A-ah, [Paul]... You just startled me, that’s all.
Hey, you did upload the document, right?
Anyways, I bought the new monster frontier,
and It has so much cool mechanics. For example…
[Paul] spoke about [his] game, but I zoned out soon after.
Pretending to be okay was way harder than I thought it could be…
and [Paul] luckily got distracted with some classmates.
I approach the teacher in a hurry.
Teacher, I need to talk to you about something… It’s just that…
Without a warning, [Paul] wraps his arm around me and joins in on the conversation.
Hi teacher, what are you talking about?
I wanted to ask the teacher for some tips, but I’ll just ask later. Bye teacher!
The teacher just looked at me confused and waved goodbye.
I quickly walked away, but [Paul] grabbed my arm.
[tn] wait… since we finished our final project, I wanted to ask you
But in a very nice restaurant I found out about earlier…
I want to treat you to it as a way of thanking you for everything you’ve done for this project
This is so unexpected, but it also feels like [Paul] has actually been noticing what I do for us…
Great! I’ll take you home and then I’ve got to go.
I need to cover a shift at work, but I’ll pick you up at your home tomorrow,
I nod and we begin walking to my home.
My heart beats fast with happiness, it feels like all this sacrifice has finally paid up!
We arrive at my house and I wave goodbye.
It’s finally the evening of our amazing date.
We both are at the restaurant, seated across from each other.
This place is amazing, unlike any other.
And the best part? I had my lover right in front of me.
I bet we look like an amazing couple right now.
We order some delicious dinner and enjoy the delicious flavors as the night passes with nice music and jokes.
[Paul] even reaches my hand from across the table and holds it dearly,
to say I’m beyond ecstatic is an understatement.
The night seems perfect, and everything is playing out as if in a true fairytale…
that is… until a notification appears on both of our phones.
It’s an e-mail from our teacher.
It reads: “Call for review with teacher due to failing grade”
I feel my sweat run cold as I read the last words:
[his] expression suddenly harsh in comparison to how giddy [he] was before.
He looks at me harshly and then just looks away.
I can only look at my fidgeting hands as I hear how [Paul] asks for the check.
Guilt eats me alive, I completely forgot to talk with the teacher about my late upload…
I feel [Paul] get up from [his] seat and I follow quickly.
We walk back, not saying a word to each other.
I can only look at [Paul]'s back as [he] walks in front of me.
[Paul]... I-I’m sorry… But you need to know, I did upload the document!
[He] stops in his tracks, still not looking at me.
Then why did we fail the class? you useless bitch.
I-It’s just… I uploaded the document after the due date…
b-but it was because H-Helpie had been beaten up in an alleyway…
A-and… I had t-to fix them…
And time flew by, [Paul], I'm s-sorry…
Fabian] promptly grabs me by my neck and pushes me into an alleyway.
So it was all because you care more about your piece of scrap than me, huh?
No, [Paul], It’s not like that- I just-
I feel a hard punch on my right eyebrow… blood begins pouring down from the punch.
This is what you and your fucking robot deserve.
You bunch of useless pieces of shit.
More punches are aimed at my body, and I fall down,
I put my hands in front of me, pleading [Paul] to stop.
P-please… I'm sorry [Paul], I'm sorry! Please… stop… just stop…
You better be sorry. I should just kill you right here and now.
But you’re not worth the trouble.
Fabian then tosses a dirty can that was lying around at me and puts [his] hands on [his] hips.
Make sure to patch that eyebrow tomorrow.
I don’t want the teacher to ask stupid questions.
You won’t ruin this as always, will you? Piece of shit.
[Paul] walks away, leaving me behind while sobbing and hurting.
I pick myself up, and clean the dirtiness out of my fancy clothes.
I never thought this would've happened…
[Paul] was so pissed off this time…
But it shouldn’t have been a surprise, really. This has happened time and time again.
Always with the promise of changing and never repeating itself…
but only to worsen each time…
I walk toward my home, looking at my feet. Everything hurts so much.
But deep inside of me, I know I shouldn’t feel bad.
I know [Paul] loves me, and this is just what [he] does when [he]’s really stressed.
